---
title: "About"
image: profile.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/aikkala
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/aikkala

---

This blog contains explorations into research ideas. These projects are pursued during my spare time, and generally are not mature enough to be submitted for peer review -- but maybe someone finds them interesting or useful!
